scripts.build:safe: npm run clean:next && npm run build
scripts.audit:maintenance: npm run audit:deps && npm run audit:dead-code
scripts.audit:security: npm run audit:service-role && npm run audit:rls-inventory && npm run audit:ops
scripts.audit:ops: node scripts/env-leak-audit.mjs && node scripts/cors-security-audit.mjs && node scripts/operational-security-check.mjs
scripts.audit:product-scope: node scripts/match-feed-invariant-audit.mjs && node scripts/no-student-dm-audit.mjs && node scripts/teacher-verification-audit.mjs && node scripts/store-parent-approval-audit.mjs && node scripts/store-economy-audit.mjs && node scripts/duel-safety-audit.mjs && node scripts/micro-lesson-gates-audit.mjs && node scripts/quiz-multi-flow-audit.mjs && node scripts/child-profile-switch-audit.mjs && node scripts/product-scope-production-check.mjs
scripts.audit:compliance: node scripts/legal-pages-audit.mjs && node scripts/export-completeness-audit.mjs && node scripts/compliance-production-check.mjs
scripts.audit:education: node scripts/micro-lesson-gates-audit.mjs && node scripts/quiz-multi-flow-audit.mjs && node scripts/duel-safety-audit.mjs && node scripts/learning-events-audit.mjs && node scripts/focus-study-plan-audit.mjs && node scripts/learn-hub-audit.mjs && node scripts/area-matched-learning-audit.mjs && node scripts/education-production-check.mjs
scripts.audit:platform: node scripts/social-shell-audit.mjs && node scripts/release-scorecard-audit.mjs && node scripts/platform-quality-check.mjs
scripts.audit:launch: node scripts/ci-alignment-audit.mjs && node scripts/hosted-launch-audit.mjs && node scripts/final-launch-check.mjs
scripts.audit:moderation: node scripts/moderation-keyword-sync-check.mjs && node scripts/moderation-pipeline-audit.mjs && node scripts/moderation-production-check.mjs
scripts.test:rls: node scripts/rls-smoke.mjs && node scripts/rls-policy-inventory-check.mjs && node scripts/service-role-audit.mjs
scripts.setup:verify: npm run test:live && npm run test:deploy && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:repo && npm run test:unit:coverage && npm run build:safe
scripts.test:repo: npm run audit:all && npm run test:migrations && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:rls && npm run test:deploy && npm run test:video-delivery && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:unit && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:playwright
scripts.test:repo:fast: npm run audit:all && npm run test:migrations && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:rls && npm run test:deploy && npm run test:video-delivery && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:unit && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.android:preflight: npm run test:mobile && npm run build:safe
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug --max-workers=1 --no-build-cache
scripts.android:build:release: npm run android:icons && npm run android:sync && node scripts/android-build-aab.mjs
